title: Rad Bazaar Alert: 59 cm Surly Steamroller
content:
The wonderful thing about The Radavist is that the audience, supporters, content, and our Rad Bazaar all surf on the same frequencies. This week, we shared Spencer’s Surly Steamroller, and then the same week, a size 59 cm was listed on the Rad Bazaar. Coinkidink or bicycle illuminati shit? You be the judge.

Our Rad Bazaar is the first member-supported cycling buy-sell-trade forum. You can gain access to a seller’s account by joining The Radavist Membership.

The post Rad Bazaar Alert: 59 cm Surly Steamroller appeared first on The Radavist.
author: John Watson
